subcodes.first_line: O Thou the Most Compassionate, the Most Merciful! Bestow a heart like unto a clear and spotless mirror
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رحمان ای رحيم دلی چون مرآت لطيف صافی عطا کن تا به انوار محبّتت
subcodes.subjects: @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @prayer for spiritual recognition
